vision_profile.current_state: A final-year B.Tech ECE student from a Tier 3 college with basic Python knowledge, urgently needing practical AI/ML skills and a project portfolio to secure a job after graduation.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Lack of practical AI/ML skills, a strong project portfolio, and confidence, coupled with immediate financial pressure to secure a job.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To land a good job as an AI Developer right after graduation to support his family and achieve his dream career.

milestones.identity_statement: You'll build a strong base in Python and problem-solving, gaining the confidence to tackle AI challenges and prepare for your first steps.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher - not yet earning from this skill

modules.title: Python for Data Science & Problem Solving
modules.description: Strengthen your Python fundamentals and develop critical problem-solving skills essential for any tech role, especially in AI.

skills.title: Python Refresher & Data Structures
skills.description: Revisit core Python concepts, data types, control flow, and essential data structures like lists, dictionaries, and sets.

video.title: Mastering Python Basics for AI

skills.title: Algorithmic Thinking & Basic Logic
skills.description: Develop your problem-solving abilities by understanding common algorithms and logical approaches to coding challenges.

video.title: Introduction to Problem Solving with Python

scenario.title: Logic Puzzle: Find the Missing Number

skills.title: Introduction to NumPy & Pandas
skills.description: Learn to use NumPy for numerical operations and Pandas for data manipulation, crucial libraries for any data scientist or AI developer.

video.title: Data Handling with NumPy and Pandas

scenario.title: Data Cleaning with Pandas: Missing Values

modules.title: Essential Math & Statistics for ML
modules.description: Understand the foundational mathematical and statistical concepts that power Machine Learning algorithms.

skills.title: Linear Algebra Basics
skills.description: Grasp the core concepts of vectors, matrices, and their operations, which are fundamental to understanding how ML models work.

video.title: Linear Algebra for ML: Vectors and Matrices

skills.title: Probability & Statistics Fundamentals
skills.description: Learn key statistical concepts like mean, median, variance, and probability distributions, vital for data analysis and model interpretation.

video.title: Statistics for Data Science: Key Concepts

skills.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib
skills.description: Master creating informative plots and charts using Matplotlib to understand and present data effectively.

video.title: Visualizing Data with Matplotlib

modules.title: Setting Up Your AI Workspace
modules.description: Learn to use essential tools and environments that professional AI developers use daily, boosting your practical readiness.

skills.title: Git & GitHub for Version Control
skills.description: Understand how to track changes in your code, collaborate, and manage projects using Git and GitHub, a must-have skill.

video.title: Introduction to Git and GitHub

skills.title: Jupyter Notebooks & Google Colab
skills.description: Learn to use interactive coding environments like Jupyter and Colab, perfect for experimenting with data and building models.

video.title: Getting Started with Jupyter and Colab

skills.title: Command Line Basics & Environment Setup
skills.description: Gain confidence using the command line and setting up virtual environments for your Python projects, ensuring clean and reproducible work.

video.title: CLI and Virtual Environments for Python

milestones.identity_statement: You'll learn the core concepts of Machine Learning, build your first model, and start creating a practical project for your portfolio.

modules.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
modules.description: Dive into the fundamental types of Machine Learning and understand how models learn from data.

skills.title: What is Machine Learning?
skills.description: Get a clear overview of Machine Learning, its applications, and the different categories like supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

video.title: Understanding the World of Machine Learning

skills.title: Supervised Learning: Regression
skills.description: Learn about regression models, how they predict continuous values, and implement your first linear regression model.

video.title: Predicting Numbers with Regression Models

skills.title: Supervised Learning: Classification
skills.description: Explore classification models, how they categorize data, and implement basic classification algorithms.

video.title: Categorizing Data with Classification Models

modules.title: Data Preprocessing & Model Training
modules.description: Learn how to prepare your data for Machine Learning models and effectively train and evaluate them.

skills.title: Data Cleaning & Feature Engineering
skills.description: Master techniques to clean messy data, handle missing values, and create new features to improve model performance.

video.title: Preparing Your Data for Machine Learning

skills.title: Introduction to Scikit-learn
skills.description: Get hands-on with Scikit-learn, the most popular Python library for traditional Machine Learning, to build and train models efficiently.

video.title: Your First Models with Scikit-learn

skills.title: Model Evaluation & Hyperparameter Tuning
skills.description: Learn to assess your model's performance using various metrics and optimize it by tuning hyperparameters.

video.title: Evaluating and Improving Your ML Models

modules.title: Building Your First ML Project
modules.description: Apply your newly acquired skills to build complete Machine Learning projects, forming the foundation of your portfolio.

skills.title: Project Planning & Dataset Selection
skills.description: Learn how to define a project scope, choose appropriate datasets, and plan your ML workflow from start to finish.

video.title: How to Plan Your First ML Project

scenario.title: Choosing a Dataset for Housing Price Prediction

skills.title: Implementing a Regression Project
skills.description: Build a complete regression project, from data loading and preprocessing to model training and evaluation, and present your findings.

video.title: Walkthrough: House Price Prediction Project

skills.title: Implementing a Classification Project
skills.description: Develop a full classification project, applying your skills to categorize data and showcase your ability to solve real-world problems.

video.title: Walkthrough: Customer Churn Prediction Project

milestones.identity_statement: You'll deepen your AI skills, build a significant end-to-end project, and prepare confidently for junior AI developer roles, ready to support your family.

modules.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
modules.description: Explore the exciting world of Deep Learning, building neural networks for more complex AI tasks.

skills.title: Introduction to Neural Networks
skills.description: Understand the basic architecture and working principles of artificial neural networks, the building blocks of deep learning.

video.title: The Basics of Neural Networks

skills.title: Building Models with TensorFlow/Keras
skills.description: Get hands-on with TensorFlow and Keras to build, train, and evaluate your first deep learning models for various tasks.

video.title: Your First Deep Learning Model with Keras

scenario.title: Classifying Digits with a Simple NN

skills.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) Basics
skills.description: Discover CNNs, a powerful type of neural network specifically designed for image recognition and computer vision tasks.

video.title: Introduction to CNNs for Image Recognition

modules.title: Model Deployment & MLOps Basics
modules.description: Learn how to take your trained AI models from your notebook to a real-world application, making them accessible to users.

skills.title: Introduction to Model Deployment
skills.description: Understand why and how to deploy machine learning models, covering different deployment strategies and challenges.

video.title: From Model to Product: An Overview of Deployment

skills.title: Building a Simple Web API with Flask/FastAPI
skills.description: Learn to create basic web services using Flask or FastAPI to expose your machine learning models as APIs.

video.title: Creating a Model API with Flask

skills.title: Docker Basics for ML Applications
skills.description: Understand how to containerize your ML applications using Docker, ensuring consistent environments and easier deployment.

video.title: Containerizing Your ML App with Docker

scenario.title: Creating a Dockerfile for a Flask App

modules.title: Portfolio Project & Job Preparation
modules.description: Build a comprehensive, deployable AI project for your portfolio and master the skills needed to ace your job interviews.

skills.title: Developing an End-to-End AI Project
skills.description: Integrate all your learned skills to build a complete AI project, from data to a deployed model, showcasing your full capabilities.

video.title: Building a Complete Image Recognition Web App

scenario.title: Design and Implement a Text Sentiment Analyzer

skills.title: Crafting Your AI Portfolio & Resume
skills.description: Learn to effectively present your projects and skills in a compelling resume and online portfolio to attract potential employers.

video.title: Building an Impressive AI Portfolio

skills.title: Interview Preparation & Communication
skills.description: Prepare for technical and behavioral interviews, practice explaining your projects, and build confidence for your job search.

video.title: Acing Your Junior AI Developer Interview
